code: import React,{useState}from"react";import api from"../services/api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function WorkflowEditor(){const[name,setName]=useState("");const[inputSchema,setInputSchema]=useState("");const createWorkflow=async()=>{try{const schema=JSON.parse(inputSchema);const res=await api.post("/workflows",{name,input_schema:schema});alert("Workflow created!");console.log(res.data);}catch(err){alert("Invalid JSON schema");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:"20px"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Create Workflow"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Workflow Name",value:name,onChange:e=>setName(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{rows:"8",cols:"50",placeholder:"Input Schema JSON",value:inputSchema,onChange:e=>setInputSchema(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("br",{}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:createWorkflow,children:"Create Workflow"})]});}export default WorkflowEditor;
